meaning: Fraction of captured images that are usable. Corrupted or unreadable images reduce effective coverage.
Fraction of images with any GPS coordinate in EXIF. Images without geotags cannot be used in photogrammetric reconstruction.
Boolean: images are in raw uncompressed format. DNG/RAW retains full radiometric depth.

formula_expression: computed from EXIF GPS positions + image footprint geometry: footprint_width = (sensor_width_mm/focal_length_mm) * actual_altitude; overlap_fwd = 1 - (along_track_distance / footprint_height)
meaning: Forward overlap computed from actual image EXIF positions and footprint geometry. Independent of any GCS-computed metric.

formula_expression: same method as image_computed_overlap_fwd_pct, lateral (cross-track) direction
meaning: Lateral overlap computed from actual EXIF positions. Captures cases where flight lines drifted apart.
Boolean: the camera manufacturer in EXIF matches the calibration file. Mismatches mean the calibration applies to different hardware.
Boolean: the camera model in EXIF matches the calibration file.
Age of the camera calibration in months at time of survey. Calibration parameters drift with thermal cycling, vibration, lens handling.
How stable camera exposure was throughout the flight session. High variance means radiometric inconsistency.
Fraction of the flight that has RINEX coverage. Ratio > 1.0 is ideal. Below 1.0 means part of the flight has no rover observations.
Boolean: the RINEX file is predominantly dual-frequency. Enables ionospheric correction in PPK.
Boolean: any gap in RINEX recording exceeds 60 seconds. A gap this long during a short drone flight effectively breaks PPK.

formula_expression: time from first RINEX epoch to first epoch where sat_count >= 4 AND cn0_mean >= 30
meaning: How long the rover took to reach stable satellite tracking after recording began.

formula_expression: mean(PDOP values) computed from satellite geometry across all RINEX epochs within the flight window
meaning: Mean Position Dilution of Precision during the actual flight window. Low PDOP means good satellite geometry.
Worst-case satellite geometry during the flight. A spike above 6.0 during the flight is much worse than the same value while parked.

formula_expression: convert(ARM_event_timestamp) using GPS.GWk + GPS.GMS at the GPS message closest to ARM
meaning: True UTC takeoff timestamp, derived from the BIN ARM event by cross-referencing the nearest GPS week + time-of-week. No external clock required.

formula_expression: convert(DISARM_event_timestamp) using GPS.GWk + GPS.GMS at the GPS message closest to DISARM
meaning: True UTC landing timestamp, derived from the BIN DISARM event.

formula_expression: count(MODE transitions into RTL or LAND while ARM_state is True)
meaning: Number of mid-flight mode changes into RTL or LAND, used as a proxy for mission interruptions.
Boolean: did the drone initiate a return-to-base mode during the flight.
Derived boolean: number of CAM shutter records in the BIN matches the number of image files on the SD card. Mismatch indicates a recording error.
Survey area polygon area derived from BIN CMD waypoints. Replaces the former planned_area_m2 source field.
Target GSD derived from planned altitude and camera geometry. Replaces former source field.
Achieved GSD computed from actual mean altitude and camera geometry. Replaces former source field.
Actual coverage percentage of planned area, computed from the union of geotagged image footprints. Replaces former source field.
How closely the achieved GSD matched the planned GSD. Ratio near 1.0 = good altitude control.
How closely achieved forward overlap matched planned overlap.
How closely achieved lateral overlap matched planned overlap.
How closely mean actual altitude matched planned altitude.
Fraction of planned waypoints successfully visited.
Fraction of the planned survey area that was actually flown.
Mean wind speed normalised against the operational limit.

formula_expression: std_dev(CTUN altitude values during cruise lines)
meaning: How much the drone's altitude fluctuated during the survey lines.
